title: Owenium
description: Ever feel like you needed a handsome Asian man in Minecraft? No? Too bad.
body:
Owenium is just a fun passion project created by me. Revolunizes Minecraft with the addition of Owenium, a new ore/material that can be used in a plethora of blocks and items.

Currently Includes:
- Owenium
- Refined Owenium
- Nuclear Owenium Waste
- Owenium Ore/Deepslate Owenium Ore
- Nuclear Owenium Ore/Deepslate Nuclear Owenium Ore
- Owenium Detector
- Owenium Sound Emitter
- Enlightened Owenium Sound Emitter
- Block of Owenium
- Compressed Nuclear Owenium
- Owenium Planks
- Owenium Apple

[Github profile of Chadderson Asian guy (pretty kewl coder imo)](https://github.com/Bi1ku) 

[My Github profile (less impressive imo)](https://github.com/ShatterdPotato)
